title: Die große Liebe
writer: Hans Flemming, Peter Groll, Rolf Hansen
actors: Zarah Leander, Grethe Weiser, Viktor Staal
plot: During a leave in Berlin, Lieutenant Paul Wendlandt, a young Luftwaffe pilot, falls for Anna Holberg, a famous singer, who returns his love. But in time of war it is hard to live on love only. The lovers keep being separated on ac...
